name: io.github.atomno-mcp/mcp-erid
description: Russian internet-ad marking (маркировка рекламы, 38-ФЗ) checker — validate an erid token, audit an ad page for the «Реклама» label, advertiser details and erid, run a 38-ФЗ compliance checklist, and explain the marking rules. Read-only validator, advisory only.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_ERID_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key (Pro tier) for batch ad-placement auditing (audit_batch). Optional: verify_erid, audit_ad_page, check_compliance_38fz and explain_marking_requirement work without a key.
